--- title: "ex12. Conditional CausalMixGPD with CRP Backend" --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal).. # Conditional CausalMixGPD: CRP Backend with Tail Augmentation **Purpose**: Combine conditional modeling with GPD tail augmentation so each covariate slice inherits both mixture bulk and tail behavior. This extends the unconditional GPD (ex06) and conditional DP (ex08). --- ## Data Setup ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} data("nc_posX100_p5_k4", package = "CausalMixGPD") y <- nc_posX100_p5_k4$y X <- as.matrix(nc_posX100_p5_k4$X) if (is.null(colnames(X))) { colnames(X) <- paste0("x", seq_len(ncol(X))) } summary_tbl <- tibble( statistic = c("N", "Mean", "SD", "Min", "Max"), value = c(length(y), mean(y), sd(y), min(y), max(y)) ) ggplot(data.frame(y = y, x1 = X[, 1]), aes(x = x1, y = y)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "darkgreen") + geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "steelblue", fill = NA) + labs(title = "Outcome vs X1 (Tail dataset)", x = "X1", y = "y") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x' ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/data-setup-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Conditional Tail Dataset Summary
statistic value
N 100.000
Mean 1.942
SD 1.146
Min 0.488
Max 5.278
````` ::: ::: --- ## Threshold Selection ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} u_threshold <- quantile(y, 0.85) ggplot(data.frame(y = y), aes(x = y)) + geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 40, fill = "magenta", alpha = 0.6, color = "black") + geom_vline(xintercept = u_threshold, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") + labs(title = paste("Threshold at", signif(u_threshold, 3)), x = "y", y = "Density") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/threshold-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: --- ## Model Specification & Bundle ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} bundle_cond_gpd_lognormal <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y, X = X, kernel = "lognormal", backend = "crp", GPD = TRUE, components = 5, param_specs = list( gpd = list( threshold = list(mode = "link", link = "exp") ) ), mcmc = mcmc ) bundle_cond_gpd_normal <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle( y = y, X = X, kernel = "normal", backend = "crp", GPD = TRUE, components = 5, param_specs = list( gpd = list( threshold = list(mode = "link", link = "exp") ) ), mcmc = mcmc ) ``` ::: --- ## Running MCMC ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_cond_gpd_lognormal <- load_or_fit("ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP-fit_cond_gpd_lognormal", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_cond_gpd_lognormal)) fit_cond_gpd_normal <- load_or_fit("ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP-fit_cond_gpd_normal", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_cond_gpd_normal)) summary(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Lognormal Distribution | GPD tail: TRUE | epsilon: 0.025 n = 100 | components = 5 Summary Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 1 WAIC: 286.942 lppd: -132.369 | pWAIC: 11.102 Summary table

``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} params_cond_gpd <- params(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal) params_cond_gpd ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Posterior mean parameters $alpha [1] "0.23" $w [1] "0.969" $meanlog [1] "0.515" $sdlog [1] "0.594" $beta_threshold [1] "-0.111" "-0.16" "0.168" "-0.036" "0.092" $beta_tail_scale [1] "0.208" "-0.063" "-0.077" "0.389" "0.011" $tail_shape [1] "-0.012" ``` ::: ::: --- ## Conditional Tail-aware Predictions ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} X_new <- rbind( c(-1, 0, 0, 0, 0), c(0, 0, 0, 0, 0), c(1, 1, 0, 0, 0) ) colnames(X_new) <- colnames(X) y_grid <- seq(0, max(y) * 1.2, length.out = 200) df_pred_lognormal <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(X_new)), function(i) { pred <- predict(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal, x = as.matrix(X_new[i, , drop = FALSE]), y = y_grid, type = "density") data.frame( y = pred$fit$y, density = pred$fit$density, label = paste("x1=", X_new[i, 1], ", x2=", X_new[i, 2], sep = ""), model = "Lognormal" ) }) df_pred_normal <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(X_new)), function(i) { pred <- predict(fit_cond_gpd_normal, x = as.matrix(X_new[i, , drop = FALSE]), y = y_grid, type = "density") data.frame( y = pred$fit$y, density = pred$fit$density, label = paste("x1=", X_new[i, 1], ", x2=", X_new[i, 2], sep = ""), model = "Normal" ) }) bind_rows(df_pred_lognormal, df_pred_normal) %>% ggplot(aes(x = y, y = density, color = label)) + geom_line(linewidth = 1) + facet_wrap(~ model) + labs(title = "Conditional Density with GPD Tail", x = "y", y = "Density") + theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "bottom") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/density-predict-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: --- ## Tail Quantiles vs Covariates ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} X_grid <- cbind(x1 = seq(-1, 1, length.out = 5), x2 = 0, x3 = 0, x4 = 0, x5 = 0) colnames(X_grid) <- colnames(X) quant_probs <- c(0.90, 0.95) pred_q_lognormal <- predict(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal, x = as.matrix(X_grid), type = "quantile", index = quant_probs) pred_q_normal <- predict(fit_cond_gpd_normal, x = as.matrix(X_grid), type = "quantile", index = quant_probs) quant_df_lognormal <- pred_q_lognormal$fit quant_df_lognormal$x1 <- X_grid[quant_df_lognormal$id, "x1"] quant_df_lognormal$model <- "Lognormal" quant_df_normal <- pred_q_normal$fit quant_df_normal$x1 <- X_grid[quant_df_normal$id, "x1"] quant_df_normal$model <- "Normal" bind_rows(quant_df_lognormal, quant_df_normal) %>% ggplot(aes(x = x1, y = estimate, color = factor(index), group = index)) + geom_line(linewidth = 1) + geom_point(size = 2) + facet_wrap(~ model) + labs(title = "Tail Quantiles vs x1 (CRP)", x = "x1", y = "Quantile", color = "Probability") + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/quantiles-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: --- ## Residuals & Diagnostics ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fitted(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/residuals-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/residuals-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_cond_gpd_lognormal, family = c("traceplot", "density", "autocorrelation")) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Scale for colour is already present. Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale. Scale for colour is already present. Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale. ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/diagnostics-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/diagnostics-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/diagnostics-3.png){width=672} ::: ```{.r .cell-code} safe_plot(fit_cond_gpd_normal, family = c("running", "geweke", "caterpillar")) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Scale for colour is already present. Adding another scale for colour, which will replace the existing scale. ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0. ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead. ℹ The deprecated feature was likely used in the ggmcmc package. Please report the issue at . ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/diagnostics-4.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/diagnostics-5.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex12-conditional-CausalMixGPD-CRP_files/figure-html/diagnostics-6.png){width=672} ::: ::: --- ## Takeaways - Conditional DPmix with a GPD tail lets posterior-mean extreme quantiles vary with covariates. - The CRP backend samples the bulk and tail jointly while thresholding at the 85th percentile. - `predict()` + `plot()` remain the main tools for densities, survival curves, and quantiles; residual diagnostics check fit quality. - Next: Mirror this workflow with the SB backend in `ex11`. --- ## Workflow Navigation - Previous: [ex11-conditional-DPmix-SB](ex11-conditional-DPmix-SB.html) - Next: [ex13-conditional-CausalMixGPD-SB](ex13-conditional-CausalMixGPD-SB.html) - Workflow index: [Roadmap](../roadmap.html) - Practical entry: [Examples](../Examples/index.html)
